## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GoodCall and GrowthX to discuss SEO progress, content strategy, and technical improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/TzgiK2mBrge19z34JfjZ7Kkmy_RRtzBC?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance is improving with 200+ daily clicks (up from 140)](https://fathom.video/share/TzgiK2mBrge19z34JfjZ7Kkmy_RRtzBC?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
  - [Focus on BPO call center content cluster (25 topics, aiming for 50 more)](https://fathom.video/share/TzgiK2mBrge19z34JfjZ7Kkmy_RRtzBC?tab=summary&timestamp=1474.0)
  - [Implementing robust internal linking strategy with tagged related articles](https://fathom.video/share/TzgiK2mBrge19z34JfjZ7Kkmy_RRtzBC?tab=summary&timestamp=1765.0)
  - [Shifting to more actionable meeting format, prioritizing blockers/improvements](https://fathom.video/share/TzgiK2mBrge19z34JfjZ7Kkmy_RRtzBC?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance and Reporting

  - [Seeing positive results: \~200 daily clicks vs 140 previously](https://fathom.video/share/TzgiK2mBrge19z34JfjZ7Kkmy_RRtzBC?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
  - [SEMrush data unreliable; focusing on actual Google Search Console data](https://fathom.video/share/TzgiK2mBrge19z34JfjZ7Kkmy_RRtzBC?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Challenge: Google's privacy measures limit keyword-level data visibility](https://fathom.video/share/TzgiK2mBrge19z34JfjZ7Kkmy_RRtzBC?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [Action: Develop internal dashboard using GA/GSC data for better insights](https://fathom.video/share/TzgiK2mBrge19z34JfjZ7Kkmy_RRtzBC?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
  - [Future: Explore topic cluster reporting and new keyword ranking opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/TzgiK2mBrge19z34JfjZ7Kkmy_RRtzBC?tab=summary&timestamp=1069.0)

### Content Strategy and Focus

  - [Doubling down on BPO call center content (25 topics, aiming for 50 more)](https://fathom.video/share/TzgiK2mBrge19z34JfjZ7Kkmy_RRtzBC?tab=summary&timestamp=1474.0)
  - [Continuing to build out this crucial cluster for at least another week](https://fathom.video/share/TzgiK2mBrge19z34JfjZ7Kkmy_RRtzBC?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)
  - [Total of 178 articles published, with 150 indexed](https://fathom.video/share/TzgiK2mBrge19z34JfjZ7Kkmy_RRtzBC?tab=summary&timestamp=1474.0)

### Technical SEO Improvements

  - [Implementing robust internal linking strategy:](https://fathom.video/share/TzgiK2mBrge19z34JfjZ7Kkmy_RRtzBC?tab=summary&timestamp=1813.0)
    1.  Full index pages for each content category
    2.  Tagged related articles displayed at bottom of posts
    3.  Multiple groupings based on relevant tags (e.g., industry + service type)
  - [Danny to set up CMS structure for tagging and auto-linking](https://fathom.video/share/TzgiK2mBrge19z34JfjZ7Kkmy_RRtzBC?tab=summary&timestamp=1987.0)
  - [Prateek to manage tagging of articles for proper interlinking](https://fathom.video/share/TzgiK2mBrge19z34JfjZ7Kkmy_RRtzBC?tab=summary&timestamp=2006.0)

### Indexing and Search Console

  - [Manually submitting 10 articles/day for indexing](https://fathom.video/share/TzgiK2mBrge19z34JfjZ7Kkmy_RRtzBC?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Some delay in indexing due to recent URL changes](https://fathom.video/share/TzgiK2mBrge19z34JfjZ7Kkmy_RRtzBC?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
  - [Adding indexing status to weekly reporting](https://fathom.video/share/TzgiK2mBrge19z34JfjZ7Kkmy_RRtzBC?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Danny: Implement CMS changes for new internal linking strategy](https://fathom.video/share/TzgiK2mBrge19z34JfjZ7Kkmy_RRtzBC?tab=summary&timestamp=1987.0)
  - [Prateek: Prioritize technical fixes/improvements at start of future meetings](https://fathom.video/share/TzgiK2mBrge19z34JfjZ7Kkmy_RRtzBC?tab=summary&timestamp=2047.0)
  - [Prateek: Reach out to Danny for help publishing BPO call center articles](https://fathom.video/share/TzgiK2mBrge19z34JfjZ7Kkmy_RRtzBC?tab=summary&timestamp=2072.0)
  - [Kyle/Jason: Continue work on automated reporting and topic cluster analysis](https://fathom.video/share/TzgiK2mBrge19z34JfjZ7Kkmy_RRtzBC?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
  - [Team: Shift meeting format to focus on blockers and improvements first, then status updates](https://fathom.video/share/TzgiK2mBrge19z34JfjZ7Kkmy_RRtzBC?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
